channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Health officials eye lettuce in spreading Cyclospora outbreak
item.description: Health officials are investigating whether lettuce and salad greens are tied to a Cyclospora outbreak that has sickened more than 3,000 people in 31 states.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Susan Solves It: Hybrid sales surge
item.description: Tampa Bay 28 Reporter Susan El Khoury advises comparing long-term ownership costs, such as insurance, maintenance, and fuel savings, before choosing your next vehicle.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News to Know for July 14
item.description: Florida prisoner set to be oldest inmate executed in state's modern history. Plus, Mega Millions jackpot grows to $637 million.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Florida prisoner, 74, set to be oldest inmate executed in state's modern history
item.description: Florida was again preparing Tuesday to execute one of its oldest death row prisoners in history, a 74-year-old convicted murderer who is one of three older inmates set to die in the span of a month.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Seminole crash kills 85-year-old man, passenger on life support: PCSO
item.description: An 85-year-old man was killed and his passenger remains on life support following a two-vehicle crash Monday evening in Seminole, according to the Pinellas County Sheriff's Office.

item.title: [Tampa Bay Beacon (Pinellas)] Forbici’s new Sundial location is now open. We got a first look.
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Cases of cyclosporiasis in Florida? See cases by county in Florida
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Is something development in the Gulf? Here's what you should know

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Florida voters want answers on rising insurance costs; here's where the candidates stand
item.description: Florida voters frustrated by skyrocketing homeowners' insurance premiums want to make sure state leaders are listening.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Mega Millions jackpot grows to $637 million
item.description: Mega Millions jackpot climbs to $637 million after no winner is announced in Friday's drawing. The next drawing will be Tuesday at 11 p.m.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 1 dead, 1 on life support after deadly Seminole crash: Pinellas deputies
item.description: The Pinellas County Sheriff's Office (PCSO) said they are investigating a fatal crash that left one dead and one on life support in Seminole on Monday night.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Southbound lanes of U.S. 19 in Tarpon Springs shut down due to crash: TSPD
item.description: The southbound lanes of U.S. Highway 19 in Tarpons Springs are closed due to a crash early Tuesday morning, authorities said.

item.title: [Tampa Bay Beacon (Pinellas)] Will St. Pete commemorate its most significant historical event?
